nasb.text: “If you buy a Hebrew slave, he shall serve for six years; but on the seventh he shall go out as a free man without payment.

esv.text: When you buy a Hebrew slave, he shall serve six years, and in the seventh he shall go out free, for nothing.

cnv.text: 如果你買希伯來人作奴僕，他要服事你六年；到第七年他可以自由出去，不必補償甚麼。

ccb.text: 你若买一个希伯来人当奴仆，他必须服侍你六年，到第七年便可以获得自由，不用支付任何赎金。
